## Checklist

- [x] I have checked my models run and compile successfully locally (`dbt build` / `dbt compile`).
- [x] My changes do not break downstream dependencies or reporting layer aggregations.
- [x] I have updated the configuration files (`dbt_project.yml` and model schema YML files) for the models I worked on.
- [x] All 54 data tests (uniqueness, non-nullability, and accepted values) pass successfully.
- [x] I have configured a skeleton `.sqlfluff` to align with the team's SQL capitalization and aliasing conventions.
- [x] I have added a skeleton `.github/CODEOWNERS` file to map code owners to specific pipeline layers.
